entries.name: code-review
entries.description: One sub-path from one GitHub repo. Bare-URL shorthand also works: 'https://github.com/anthropics/skills/code-review'.

entries.name: anthropic-bundle
entries.description: Many skills from one repo with one fetch. With multi-path, each landing dir is the basename (or per-path 'as' alias) and the entry name is metadata only.
Array source: three separate sources mirrored into one target. Names are derived from each element (CONDUIT-team-A, CONDUIT-team-B, HouseStyle).

entries.name: internal-runbooks
entries.description: Private repo pinned to an immutable commit via the URL-native form. Uses CONDUIT_GITHUB_TOKEN (or 'gh auth token' via the default auth chain).

entries.name: azdo-skills
entries.description: Azure DevOps repo with two sub-paths, custom aliases (so they don't clash with the github multi-path basenames above) and the default [env, az] auth chain.
Local in-house skill. Name omitted: Conduit derives 'house-style' from the directory basename. Per-target 'as' renames the destination at one target only.

entries.name: parked-for-later
entries.description: Disabled entries are skipped at sync time but kept for documentation.
